title: [ImportVerilog] Insert missing conversions around instance ports

features.name: instance port connection with array type mismatch
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the connected signal type differs from the instance port type, with the port being a single-element array of an integral type

features.name: instance port with unpacked array type connecting to scalar
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an unpacked array port (single dimension) receives a scalar integral connection
